question: What is the name of the country with the most car makers?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CountryName FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId GROUP BY T1.Country ORDER BY Count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.coun FROM countries AS T1 JOIN car_makers AS T2 ON T1.coun = T2.coun GROUP BY T1.coun ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
raw_response: SELECT T1.coun FROM countries AS T1 JOIN car_makers AS T2 ON T1.coun = T2.coun GROUP BY T1.coun ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
